title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a large GPU cluster. The commentator argues that Anthropic lacks vertical integration compared to other frontier labs, relying on external partners for chips and infrastructure, and suggests the AI race is shifting toward chip control and datacenter access rather than just model benchmarks.
